exhibits.name: List of State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
List of Franchisees and Certain Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 44 pages of text content with franchisee names, addresses, phone numbers

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Cover page p.122; FY2024/2023 statements pp.123–158 (IMAGE-ONLY, 36 pages); FY2022/2021/2020 statements pp.159–206 (text-readable, 48 pages). Auditor: PwC. Guarantor: MTY Franchising USA, Inc.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Includes Attachments A–D. Key operative contract. Not yet clause-walked.

exhibits.name: State Law Addenda
exhibits.notes: Covers 10 states: CA, HI, IL, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, VA, WA. Material overrides to noncompete, forum selection, governing law, general release, termination.

exhibits.name: Form of Multiple Store Commitment Letter and Amendment to Franchise Agreements
ACH Debit and Credit Authorization Form
Guarantee of Performance
exhibits.notes: MTY Franchising USA, Inc. unconditionally guarantees franchisor's obligations.

exhibits.name: Financial Responsibility Agreement
exhibits.notes: Includes Exhibit A to Exhibit K (2 pages).

exhibits.name: Successive Addendum
exhibits.notes: Governs renewal/successive term. Important for understanding renewal economics.

exhibits.name: Release of Claims
exhibits.notes: Required for renewal and transfer. Scope critical for franchisee rights.
